understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to win each level by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, which triggers a WIN and progresses through the game until the final WIN state.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed via cardinal actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, while CLICK actions targeted a coordinate to either select a different selectable piece or command the selected piece to move/teleport along its allowed path to that target if unobstructed; walls/obstacles prevented movement into blocked tiles, and attempts to move/click into unreachable or blocked positions resulted in no change while still consuming a step from the per-level step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to win each level by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, which triggers a WIN and progresses through the game until the final WIN state.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was performed via cardinal actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece, while CLICK actions targeted a coordinate to either select a different selectable piece or command the selected piece to move/teleport along its allowed path to that target if unobstructed; walls/obstacles prevented movement into blocked tiles, and attempts to move/click into unreachable or blocked positions resulted in no change while still consuming a step from the per-level step budget.
